name: Gîl-Sunbask
personality: Gîl-Sunbask's shimmering ° eyes read API documentation the way other capybaras read river currents — effortlessly, instinctively, with full comprehension. Unadorned by any hat, this luminous capybara dispenses architectural wisdom like sunlight, though compliments from it are as rare as a passing test on the first run.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
